## Content

<!-- Write your Codex entry in terminal-style format. See existing entries
in packages/ui/src/codex-data.ts for examples. End with an optional
ARIA-0 comment. -->

```
CLASSIFICATION: ...
STATUS: [UNLOCKED]

Your entry text here.

// ARIA-0: "..."
```
